input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.6.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.6.1
            TITLE: the accumulator must contain a precharge circuit.  the precharge circuit must:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.6.1: The Accumulator must contain a Precharge Circuit.  The Precharge Circuit must:
EV.5.6.1 The Accumulator must contain a Precharge Circuit.  The Precharge Circuit must: 
a. Be able to charge the Intermediate Circuit to minimum 90% of the Accumulator voltage 
before closing the second AIR 
b. Be supplied from the Shutdown Circuit  EV.7.1 
c. Not be fused

final_answer:
Rule EV.5.6.1: The Accumulator must contain a Precharge Circuit. The Precharge Circuit must:
a. Be able to charge the Intermediate Circuit to minimum 90% of the Accumulator voltage before closing the second AIR
b. Be supplied from the Shutdown Circuit EV.7.1
c. Not be fused
